name: Fleet BYOV Technician Onboarding
description: Complete BYOV (Bring Your Own Vehicle) onboarding process for fleet technicians

steps.title: Van Management
steps.description: Handle permanent van reassignment for BYOV transition

substeps.title: Unassign permanent van
substeps.description: Remove current permanent van assignment from technician

substeps.title: Identify and Assign new permanent van #
substeps.description: Locate and assign new permanent van number for BYOV vehicle

steps.title: System Updates
steps.description: Update all fleet management systems with new van information

substeps.title: Update all systems, tpms, holman, ams
substeps.description: Update TPMS, Holman, AMS and all other fleet systems with new van assignment

substeps.title: Update truck address and notes for the truck assignment and status
substeps.description: Update vehicle address, assignment notes, and status information in fleet systems

steps.title: Communication
steps.description: Notify stakeholders of new van number assignment

substeps.title: Ensure the original submitter is aware of the correct van # to use in tech hub
substeps.description: Contact original submitter to provide new van number for tech hub usage
